title: Formatting of updates sent to MS Teams
excerpt: We’re using the monday to MS Teams integration to send updates to a MS Teams channel which on the whole works fine, but if the Monday.com update includes any rich text formatting or paragraphs then this doesn’t show in M…

posts.author: RajeevD (Rajeev)
posts.cookedHtml: We’re using the monday to MS Teams integration to send updates to a MS Teams channel which on the whole works fine, but if the Monday.com update includes any rich text formatting or paragraphs then this doesn’t show in MS Teams.

posts.author: Clarey (MondayMotivator)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey, sorry, I believe this is a known limitation of the monday.com to MS Teams integration — rich text formatting (like bold, italics, or line breaks) often gets stripped when updates are sent to Teams. The integration currently sends plain text only.

A workaround is to use monday.com automations to send a customized plain-text message to Teams, or include a link back to the item for full context. Hopefully, support for rich text will be added in future updates.
